CATALYST-UNIVERSE_FORM.description: At the start of your turn, gain !GrowPower! [gold]Grow[/gold] and add 1 [gold]Lust[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Increase Grow by 2 each turn.
CATALYST-LUST.title: Lust
CATALYST-LUST.description:
Put this on the bottom of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
At the end of your turn, gain !GrowPower! [gold]Grow[/gold] and lose !HpLoss! HP. At the start of your next turn, add 1 [gold]Lust[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold] and shuffle 1 [gold]Lust[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
CATALYST-POCKET_MAGMA.title: Pocket Magma
CATALYST-ERM_ACTUALLY.description:
#Gain !B! [gold]Block[/gold].
Choose a card in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]. [gold]Mark[/gold] it and shuffle it into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
CATALYST-ERM_ACTUALLY.selectionScreenPro: Choose a card to Mark and shuffle into your Draw Pile.
CATALYST-ERM_ACTUALLY.title: Erm, actually...
CATALYST-SINGLE_STROKE_BATTLE.descriptio: #If the enemy has !ExecuteThreshold!HP or less, [red]Kill[/red] it.

CATALYST-FROM_THE_EARTH.description: #[gold]Concentrate every turn:[/gold] Gain !GrowPower! [gold]Grow[/gold]. Apply !FloatingPower! [gold]Levitate[/gold] to all enemies.

#Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies.

#Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies.
Apply !ShrinkPower! [gold]Shrink[/gold] to ALL enemies hit.
CATALYST-FOR_WHOM_THE_BELL_TOLLS.descrip: #Deal !D! damage. [gold]Fatal:[/gold] Add 1 stack to Blue Sleigh Bell.
